title: Comments
no_access: You do not have permission to view comments on this project.

client.title: Client-visible thread
client.body: The customer can see these comments on their kiosk page once this sheet is shared. Keep internal discussion on the project workspace.

internal.title: Internal team only
internal.body: Customers and kiosk guests will never see these comments.

states.empty: No comments yet. Start the conversation.
states.pinned_hint: This thread is flagged as needing resolution. It will stay pinned to the top until someone resolves it.

actions.flag_hint: Pin this thread to the top and unlock the Resolve button.
actions.unflag_hint: Remove the pin without resolving the thread.

confirm.delete: Delete this comment? This cannot be undone.

composer.placeholder: Write a comment… Type @ then Tab or Enter to mention a teammate.

typing.template: {count, plural, one {{first} is typing…} =2 {{first} and {second} are typing…} other {{first}, {second}, and {rest, plural, one {# other} other {# others}} are typing…}}

kiosk.title: Introduce yourself
kiosk.subtitle: Share your name so the project team knows who left the comment.
kiosk.privacy_note: We store your name and email with each comment so the project team can follow up. No account is created.
kiosk.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
kiosk.error_session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
